ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player belongs to */,
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the position of the player */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the player */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the player joined the league */,
  "nation" TEXT /* Nation the player represents */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player */,
  "footed" TEXT /* Footedness of the player (e.g., left, right) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_position_id FOREIGN KEY ("position_id") REFERENCES positions ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "team_code" TEXT /* Code for the team (e.g., CHE, EVE) */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Stadium where the team plays */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_logs" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who played the game */,
  "starts" INTEGER /* Number of starts for the player */,
  "mins" INTEGER /* Number of minutes played */,
  "on" INTEGER /* Number of times the player came on as a substitute */,
  "off" INTEGER /* Number of times the player went off as a substitute */,
  "g" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored */,
  "a" INTEGER /* Number of assists */,
  "fa" INTEGER /* Number of fantasy assists */,
  "ta" INTEGER /* Number of tackles attempted */,
  "cs" INTEGER /* Number of clean sheets */,
  "gc" INTEGER /* Number of goals conceded */,
  "og" INTEGER /* Number of own goals */,
  "pl_yellow" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards */,
  "pl_red" INTEGER /* Number of red cards */,
  "vs" TEXT /* Team the player played against */,
  "gw" INTEGER /* Game week */,
  "home" INTEGER /* Whether the game was played at home */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_logs_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "position_name" TEXT /* Name of the position (e.g., Forward, Defender, Midfielder) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the player */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the player was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, update) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_logs_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, coach, analyst) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Team the user is associated with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "disciplinary_actions" (
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each disciplinary action */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player receiving the disciplinary action */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game where the disciplinary action occurred */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards received */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Number of red cards received */,
  "suspension_games" INTEGER /* Number of games the player is suspended for */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_disciplinary_actions_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES game_logs ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_disciplinary_actions_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player statistic */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player being tracked */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played by the player */,
  "goals_scored" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists made by the player */,
  "clean_sheets" INTEGER /* Number of clean sheets kept by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player being injured */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date the injury occurred */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Expected return date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
